debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Migrated StateHistory for ' + $migratedCount + ' existing ships'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Migrating trade cache to v6 (normalized trade schema)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Trade cache initialized as per-home-sector table (v6 - normalized trade schema)'

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] SETTINGS.Fleet: Coordination=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$EnableFleetCoordination + ' CacheDropoffTolerance=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$CacheDropoffTolerance + ' CacheTTL=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$CacheTTL + ' MinPlayerMoney=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$MinPlayerMoney

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] SETTINGS.XP: UseVanillaXPOnly=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly + ' AutoTraining=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$AutoTraining + ' HardForceTraining=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$HardForceTraining + ' XPMultiplier=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$XPMultiplier + ' MinTrainingDistance=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$MinTrainingDistance + ' TrainingCooldown=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$TrainingCooldown + ' CommanderBonusPercent=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$CommanderBonusPercent

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] SETTINGS.Performance: MaxConcurrentLive=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$MaxConcurrentLiveSearches + ' MaxConcurrentFallback=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$MaxConcurrentFallbackSearches + ' MaxTradesToReturn=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$MaxTradesToReturn + ' CacheChunkSize=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$CacheQueryChunkSize + ' CacheMaxEntries=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$CacheQueryMaxEntries + ' MaxOffersPerSearch=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$MaxOffersPerSearch

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] SETTINGS.Performance2: MaxOffersPerWare=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$MaxOffersPerWare + ' MaxTradesPerWare=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$MaxTradesPerWare + ' BatchChunkSize=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$BatchChunkSize + ' SearchLockTTL=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$SearchLockTTL + ' LiveOfferSliceInterval=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$LiveOfferSliceInterval + ' AIYield=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$AIYieldInterval + 'ms StaleThreshold=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$StaleThresholdSeconds + ' TradeFoundDelay=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$TradeFoundSignalDelay + ' CacheWriteBatch=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$CacheWriteBatchSize + ' CacheCleanupBatch=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Performance.$CacheCleanupBatchSize

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] SETTINGS.ThreatAvoidance: Enabled=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled + ' ScanInterval=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$ScanInterval + ' ThreatExpiry=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$ThreatExpiry + ' HostileRelationThreshold=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$HostileRelationThreshold + ' UseDynamicBlacklist=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$UseDynamicBlacklist + ' BlockEnemyFactions=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlockEnemyFactions + ' BlacklistThreshold=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlacklistThreshold

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] SETTINGS.Notifications: ShowXPGains=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Notifications.$ShowXPGains + ' ShowTradeResults=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Notifications.$ShowTradeResults + ' ShowFleetStatus=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Notifications.$ShowFleetStatus + ' SimpleReportFreq=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Notifications.$SimpleReportFrequency + ' ComprehensiveReportFreq=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Notifications.$ComprehensiveReportFrequency
